name: PT Metropolitan Kentjana Tbk
summary: PT Metropolitan Kentjana Tbk develops and manages lands and buildings in Indonesia. The company operates through Shopping Center, Office, Apartment, Real Estate, Air/Water Park, and Hotel segments. It also engages in the rental of space in shopping centers, office buildings, and apartments; and sale of land and buildings. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.
